findings.summary: Edge.Cuts counted as a copper layer, inflating copper_layers_used to 5
findings.details: statistics.copper_layers_used is 5 and copper_layer_names includes 'Edge.Cuts', but Edge.Cuts is a type='user' non-copper layer. The real copper layers are F.Cu, In1.Cu, In2.Cu, and B.Cu (4 layers).

findings.summary: USB CC1 5k1 pulldown incorrectly reported as failing
findings.details: usb_compliance reports cc1_pulldown_5k1: fail and cc2_pulldown_5k1: pass, but both CC1 and CC2 each connect to a separate R5 (5k1) resistor to GND. The compliance checker appears to de-duplicate by reference name and only matches the 5k1 check to one CC line.

findings.summary: sourcing_audit reports 0% MPN coverage but all components have LCSC part numbers
findings.details: sourcing_audit.mpn_coverage is '0/23' and mpn_percent is 0.0, because the 'mpn' field is empty on all components. However, all 23 BOM components have LCSC numbers. The sourcing audit should recognise LCSC coverage as a valid sourcing metric.
